chunks.title: Introduction and Praise
chunks.reason: The psalmist introduces the context of feigned madness and declares a commitment to bless Yahweh continually.

chunks.title: Testimony of Deliverance
chunks.reason: A narrative section describing personal experience of Yahweh's answer and deliverance from dread and trouble.

chunks.title: Instruction on the Fear of Yahweh
chunks.reason: A direct address to children and the community offering wisdom on speech, conduct, and the assurance of God's protection.
